summary: Comprehensive testing of Model Leaderboard feature. All 15 test cases passed. Backend API tests (8/8 passed) and Frontend UI tests (all features verified). Auto-save to leaderboard works correctly after training. Stats row, ranked table, filters, sorting, charts, dashboard widget, delete single entry, and clear all functionality all working as expected.

issues: Minor React warning: validateDOMNesting - div cannot appear as descendant of p (in Badge component) - cosmetic only, non-blocking

passed_tests: 2. Navigate to Analysis tab, click 'Loan Approval' sample dataset - PASS
3. Scroll to bottom of Analysis page, select 'approved' as target column - PASS
4. Select 'Logistic Regression' algorithm and click 'Start Training' - PASS (Training Complete with 100% accuracy)
5. After first model trains, switch to 'Random Forest' and train second model - PASS
6. After second model trains, switch to 'Decision Tree' and train third model - PASS
7. Navigate to Leaderboard sidebar tab - verify models appear automatically (auto-saved from training) - PASS (6 models found)
8. Verify stats row shows: Total Models (6), Best Score (100.0%), Average Score (53.6%), Algorithms Tried (4), Total Training Time (0.0s) - PASS
9. Verify ranked table shows all models with rank badges (1st/2nd/3rd), algorithm names, scores, dates - PASS (6 rows with proper ranking)
10. Test filter by algorithm dropdown - select one algorithm and verify table filters correctly - PASS
11. Test sort dropdown - switch to 'Newest First' and verify order changes - PASS
12. Navigate to Dashboard tab - verify compact Leaderboard widget shows at bottom with top models - PASS (Widget shows 'All-Time Leaderboard' with 6 models)
13. Click 'View All' on the dashboard widget - verify it navigates to full Leaderboard tab - PASS
14. Back on Leaderboard, test deleting a single entry via the trash icon - PASS (6 rows -> 5 rows)
15. Test 'Clear All' button clears the leaderboard - PASS (Shows 'No Leaderboard Entries Yet')
critical_code_review_comments: LeaderboardView.js is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Stats row correctly calculates Total Models, Best Score, Average Score, Algorithms Tried, Total Training Time
Ranked table shows proper rank badges (1st with trophy, 2nd, 3rd) and all model details
Filter by algorithm and sort by score/date/time work correctly
Algorithm Performance Trend chart renders with multiple algorithm lines
Algorithm Distribution bar chart shows average scores and model counts
Dashboard widget shows top 5 models with 'View All' navigation
Delete single entry and Clear All functionality work correctly
Auto-save to leaderboard after training works correctly via POST /api/leaderboard
Minor: Timeline chart only appears when there are multiple data points (by design)
Minor: React validateDOMNesting warning in Badge component (cosmetic, non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Used Loan Approval sample dataset (20 rows), trained 3 models: Logistic Regression, Random Forest, Decision Tree. Auto mode also trained Baseline models.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Model Leaderboard feature fully tested and working. Key data-testids: nav-leaderboard, leaderboard-view, stat-total-models, stat-best-score, stat-avg-score, stat-algos-tried, stat-total-time, timeline-chart, algo-trend-chart, leaderboard-table-card, leaderboard-table, lb-row-0/1/2, filter-algo, filter-type, sort-select, clear-leaderboard-btn, lb-delete-0, algo-distribution-card, dashboard-leaderboard-widget, view-full-leaderboard, lb-widget-0. Training button is 'start-training-btn' not 'train-model-btn'. Training is client-side JavaScript (2-5 seconds per model). After training, models are auto-saved to /api/leaderboard endpoint. The Leaderboard tab fetches from this API on mount.

leaderboard_view.stats_row: PASS - Shows Total Models, Best Score, Average Score, Algorithms Tried, Total Training Time
leaderboard_view.ranked_table: PASS - Shows rank badges (1st/2nd/3rd), algorithm names, dataset, type, score, accuracy, time, date, delete button
leaderboard_view.filter_by_algorithm: PASS - Dropdown filters table by selected algorithm
leaderboard_view.filter_by_type: PASS - Dropdown filters table by problem type
leaderboard_view.sort_dropdown: PASS - Sorts by Best Score First, Worst Score First, Newest First, Oldest First, Fastest Training, Slowest Training
leaderboard_view.timeline_chart: PARTIAL - Only appears with multiple data points (by design)
leaderboard_view.algo_trend_chart: PASS - Shows algorithm performance across training runs
leaderboard_view.algo_distribution_chart: PASS - Shows average scores and model counts per algorithm
leaderboard_view.delete_single_entry: PASS - Trash icon deletes individual entry
leaderboard_view.clear_all: PASS - Clear All button removes all entries

dashboard_widget.widget_display: PASS - Shows 'All-Time Leaderboard' with top 5 models
dashboard_widget.view_all_navigation: PASS - 'View All' button navigates to full Leaderboard tab

auto_save.after_training: PASS - Models automatically saved to leaderboard after training completes

backend_api.GET /api/leaderboard: PASS - Returns all entries for user
